summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Strategy Templates feature. All 4 pre-built strategy templates working correctly with real data backtesting. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend integration successful after fixing JavaScript errors.

minor_issues.issue: Backend API not accessible via external URL (404 errors)
minor_issues.impact: Frontend cannot connect to backend via external URL

integration_issues.issue: Frontend using external URL instead of localhost for API calls
integration_issues.workaround: Temporarily hardcoded localhost URL for testing

javascript_errors_fixed.error: symbol is not defined in Dashboard component

passed_tests: Mean Reversion template backtest (83 trades, 74.7% win rate, PF=12.74)
Trend Following template backtest (43 trades, 51.2% win rate, PF=1.25)
Breakout template backtest (45 trades, 35.6% win rate, PF=0.93)
Hybrid template backtest (37 trades, 54.0% win rate, PF=1.45)
All templates use real CSV data (8,760 candles XAUUSD)
Strategy Templates tab appears in Dashboard
All 4 template cards display with proper styling
Backtest results include: total_trades, win_rate, profit_factor, max_drawdown
REAL DATA indicator shows in results
Strategy grades calculated (S, F, F, D respectively)
Template icons and colors working correctly

success_percentage.backend: 100% (6/6 tests passed - all strategy template APIs working)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (UI working, templates loading, backtest integration working)
success_percentage.integration: 95% (Works on localhost, external URL routing issue)

action_item_for_main_agent: 1. Fix external URL routing configuration for both frontend and backend to enable production deployment. 2. Update StrategyTemplateSelector component to properly use environment variables instead of hardcoded localhost URL. 3. Consider adding error handling for API failures in the frontend component.
